# robots.txt for suvadityamuk.com
# Allow all search engine crawlers to index the site

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location (generated by jekyll-sitemap plugin)
Sitemap: https://suvadityamuk.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow irrelevant paths
Disallow: /files/
Disallow: /images/favicon*
Disallow: /assets/js/
